title: Meet some of our notable grads for spring 2026
summary_en: From creating community, to serving others and bringing home Olympic gold, these soon-to-be-grads define what it means to be a Badger.
title_cn: 2026年春季部分杰出毕业生简介

title: UW survey offers first comprehensive look at student basic needs
summary_en: Student Affairs and the Division of Enrollment Management (DEM) has released findings and recommendations from a survey conducted in spring 2025 to better understand the experiences, barriers, and factors associated with basic needs access among students.
title_cn: UW survey offers first comprehensive look at student basic needs

title: UW–Madison names Remzi Arpaci-Dusseau founding dean of College of Computing and Artificial Intelligence, announces major investment in college’s launch
summary_en: $100 million in philanthropic support and a significant campus investment, including 50 new faculty positions, will support research, education and innovation
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校任命雷姆齐·阿尔帕奇-杜索为计算与人工智能学院创始院长并宣布投入重大资金启动学院建设

title: Now a Truman Scholar, UW junior Miranda Garcia-Dove’s dedication to public service is driven by curiosity and kindness
summary_en: One of the top academic awards for undergraduate students, Truman Scholarships support the next generation of leaders
title_cn: 新晋杜鲁门学者、华盛顿大学三年级学生米兰达·加西亚-多夫投身公共服务的热忱源自好奇心与善意

title: ‘Being part of something bigger than you’ with Badger Volunteers
summary_en: UW–Madison students head into the local community to find purpose and make a difference.
title_cn: 参与獾志愿者项目：“成为比自身更宏大事业的一份子”
